documents.title: basis_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # Basis & ABAP Dev Operations

documents.title: basis_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Includes transport request operations, ST22 dumps analysis, code syntax checking/analysis, and direct source file packaging (.nugg format).

documents.title: basis_operations.md — `BASIS_CREATE_REQUEST`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a new Customizing or Workbench transport request.
- **Backend FM**: `TR_INSERT_REQUEST_WITH_TASKS`
- **Fields**:
  - `description`: Text/title of request
  - `target`: Target system (optional)
  - `type`: 'K' (Workbench) or 'W' (Customizing)
  - `owner`: Owner username (default: sy-uname)

documents.title: basis_operations.md — `BASIS_RELEASE_REQUEST`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Release a transport request.
- **Backend FM**: `TR_RELEASE_REQUEST`
- **Fields**:
  - `request`: Transport request ID (e.g. DEVK900042)

documents.title: basis_operations.md — `BASIS_ST22_SCAN`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Read recent runtime dumps.
- **Direct tables**: `SNAP`, `SNAPT`
- **Fields**:
  - `period`: 24h, 7d, 30d
  - `program_filter`: Program name pattern (e.g. Z*)
  - `user_filter`: Username pattern

documents.title: basis_operations.md — `BASIS_CODE_ANALYSIS`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Run ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) check or Code Inspector variant.
- **Route**: Executed via ADT tool wrappers.

documents.title: basis_operations.md — `BASIS_CREATE_NUGG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Download specific program code and its includes in SAPlink .nugg format.
- **Backend FM**: `RPY_PROGRAM_READ`

documents.title: bw_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # BW — Business Warehouse Operations Map

documents.title: bw_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers BW data modeling (ADSO, CompositeProvider), process chains monitoring (RSPC), and BEx query execution/troubleshooting.

documents.title: bw_operations.md — `BW_MONITOR_CHAIN`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Monitor/troubleshoot a process chain run.
- **Backend BAPI**: `RSPC_API_CHAIN_GET_STATUS`
- **Fields**:
  - `chain_id`: Process Chain Technical Name

documents.title: bw_operations.md — `BW_EXECUTE_QUERY`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Run/verify BEx Query output.
- **Backend BAPI**: `RRMX_REPORT_START` / RSRT query execution
- **Fields**:
  - `query_name`: BEx Query Technical Name

documents.title: bw_operations.md — T-codes
documents.content: RSPC, RSRT, RSA1, RS11, RSD1

documents.title: bw_operations.md — Tables
documents.content: RSPCLOGCHAIN, RSPCPROCESSLOG, RSZCOMPDIR

documents.title: co_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # Controlling (CO) Operations

documents.title: co_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers Internal Orders creation, cost allocation, profit center structures check, and CO configurations.

documents.title: co_operations.md — `CO_CREATE_ORDER`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a Controlling Internal Order.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_INTERNALORDER_CREATE`
- **Fields**:
  - `order_name`: Name/description of internal order
  - `order_type`: Internal order type (COAS)
  - `controlling_area`: Controlling Area (TKA01)

documents.title: co_operations.md — `CO_ACTIVITY_ALLOC`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Post direct activity allocation.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_ACC_ACTIVITY_ALLOC_POST`

documents.title: co_operations.md — `CO_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify CO configuration tables.
- **Tables checked**:
  - `TKA01` (controlling areas)
  - `CSKS` (cost centers list)
  - `CSKA` (cost elements catalog)
  - `TKA02` (CO assignment company code mappings)

documents.title: ewm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # EWM — Extended Warehouse Management Operations Map

documents.title: ewm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers Extended Warehouse Management operations: Warehouse Tasks/Orders, Wave management, Packing, RF Framework, and Physical Inventory.

documents.title: ewm_operations.md — `EWM_PICKING`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Execute picking wave processing.
- **Backend BAPI**: /SCWM/MON (Monitor) / /SCWM/WAVE wave release.
- **Fields**:
  - `warehouse_no`: Warehouse Number
  - `wave_no`: Wave number

documents.title: ewm_operations.md — `EWM_PUTAWAY`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create putaway warehouse task.
- **Backend BAPI**: /SCWM/TO_CREATE (Task creation)
- **Fields**:
  - `warehouse_no`: Warehouse Number
  - `item_no`: Item number

documents.title: ewm_operations.md — `EWM_PHYS_INV`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create Physical Inventory document.
- **Backend BAPI**: /SCWM/PI_CREATE
- **Fields**:
  - `warehouse_no`: Warehouse Number
  - `bin`: Storage bin

documents.title: ewm_operations.md — T-codes
documents.content: /SCWM/MON, /SCWM/WAVE, /SCWM/PACK, /SCWM/RFUI, /SCWM/PI, LT01, LB01

documents.title: ewm_operations.md — Tables
documents.content: /SCWM/TOHR, /SCWM/TOIT, /SCWM/WAVEHDR, /SCWM/LAGP

documents.title: fi_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # Financial Accounting (FI) Operations

documents.title: fi_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers General Ledger postings, document reversals, GL Account checks, and FI configuration verification.

documents.title: fi_operations.md — `FI_POST_DOCUMENT`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Post a General Ledger or Accounts Payable/Receivable document.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST`
- **Fields**:
  - `comp_code`: Company code (T001)
  - `doc_date`: Document Date
  - `pstng_date`: Posting Date
  - `doc_type`: Document Type (T003)
  - `username`: Posting User
  - `items`: Array of line items (account, amount, cost_center, profit_center)

documents.title: fi_operations.md — `FI_REVERSE_DOCUMENT`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Reverse a posted financial document.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_REV_POST`
- **Fields**:
  - `obj_type`: Object Type
  - `obj_key`: Object Key (Document Number + Company Code + Fiscal Year)
  - `reason`: Reversal Reason

documents.title: fi_operations.md — `FI_CHECK_ACCOUNTS`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify if GL accounts are active and mapped.
- **Tables**: `SKA1`, `SKB1`, `SKAT`

documents.title: fi_operations.md — `FI_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify FI configuration tables.
- **Tables checked**:
  - `T001` (company codes)
  - `T004` (chart of accounts)
  - `T003` (document types)
  - `T009` (fiscal year variants)

documents.title: hcm_onprem_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # HCM On-Premises Operations

documents.title: hcm_onprem_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Handles SAP HR (HCM) on-premises execution using standard RFCs and infotype operations.

documents.title: hcm_onprem_operations.md — `HCM_READ_EMPLOYEE`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Retrieve employee metadata (PA0001, PA0002).
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_EMPLOYEE_GETDATA`
- **Fields**:
  - `employee_number`: PERNR (Employee Number)

documents.title: hcm_onprem_operations.md — `HCM_CREATE_INFOTYPE`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create/Insert an Infotype record.
- **Backend FM**: `HR_INFOTYPE_OPERATION`
- **Fields**:
  - `employee_number`: PERNR
  - `infotype`: Infotype code (e.g. 0001)
  - `subtype`: Subtype code
  - `begin_date`: Start Date
  - `end_date`: End Date (default: 99991231)
  - `record`: JSON formatted data representing the infotype structure

documents.title: hcm_onprem_operations.md — `HCM_CHANGE_INFOTYPE`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Modify an Infotype record.
- **Backend FM**: `HR_INFOTYPE_OPERATION`
- **Fields**: Same as create (operation set to 'MOD').

documents.title: hcm_onprem_operations.md — `HCM_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify HR configuration tables.
- **Tables checked**:
  - `T500P` (personnel areas)
  - `T001P` (personnel subareas)
  - `T503` (employee groups)
  - `T510` (pay scale tables)

documents.title: hcm_sf_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # HCM SuccessFactors Operations

documents.title: hcm_sf_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: SuccessFactors operations are executed via SuccessFactors OData APIs through the `sf-mcp` (Model Context Protocol) server.

documents.title: hcm_sf_operations.md — `SF_READ_EMPLOYEE`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Get user profile data.
- **Endpoint**: `/odata/v2/User`
- **Params**:
  - `$filter`: User ID or username filter
  - `$select`: Specific fields to select

documents.title: hcm_sf_operations.md — `SF_READ_ORG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Read departments organization structure.
- **Endpoint**: `/odata/v2/FODepartment`

documents.title: hcm_sf_operations.md — `SF_READ_EMPLOYMENT`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Read active employment details.
- **Endpoint**: `/odata/v2/EmpEmployment`

documents.title: hcm_sf_operations.md — `SF_READ_COMP`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Read compensation information.
- **Endpoint**: `/odata/v2/EmpCompensation`

documents.title: hcm_sf_operations.md — `SF_READ_TIMEOFF`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Read employee time off entries.
- **Endpoint**: `/odata/v2/EmployeeTime`

documents.title: mm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # Materials Management (MM) Operations

documents.title: mm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers Material Master creation/modification, Purchase Order processes, Goods Movements, configuration checks, and active enhancements scan.

documents.title: mm_operations.md — `MM_CREATE_MATERIAL`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a new Material Master.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA`
- **Fields**:
  - `material`: Material Number (external)
  - `material_type`: Material Type (T134)
  - `industry`: Industry Sector (T137)
  - `description`: Text
  - `base_uom`: Base UoM
  - `plant`: Plant
  - `stor_loc`: Storage Location

documents.title: mm_operations.md — `MM_CHANGE_MATERIAL`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Modify an existing Material Master.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA`
- **Fields**: Same as create (delta fields).

documents.title: mm_operations.md — `MM_CREATE_PO`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a Purchase Order.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_PO_CREATE1`
- **Fields**:
  - `doc_type`: PO type (T161)
  - `purch_org`: Purchasing Org
  - `pur_group`: Purchasing Group
  - `vendor`: Vendor code
  - `material`: Material number
  - `plant`: Plant
  - `quantity`: Quantity
  - `price`: Price

documents.title: mm_operations.md — `MM_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify MM configuration tables.
- **Tables checked**:
  - `T161` (document types)
  - `T024` (purchasing groups)
  - `T001W` (plants)
  - `T156` (movement types)

documents.title: mm_operations.md — `MM_CHECK_ENHANCEMENTS`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Scan for active BAdIs and User Exits in MM.
- **T-Codes mapped**: `ME21N`, `MIGO`, `MM01`
- **Tables**: `MODACT`, `SXS_ATTR`

documents.title: pm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # PM — Plant Maintenance Operations Map

documents.title: pm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers Work Order creation/modification, Maintenance Notifications, Equipment Master records, and preventive maintenance scheduling.

documents.title: pm_operations.md — `PM_CREATE_ORDER`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a new Plant Maintenance Work Order.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN`
- **Fields**:
  - `order_type`: Maintenance Order type (AUART)
  - `equipment`: Equipment Number (EQUNR)
  - `description`: Short description
  - `plant`: Maintenance Plant (WERKS)

documents.title: pm_operations.md — `PM_CREATE_NOTIFICATION`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a Plant Maintenance Notification.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_ALM_NOTIF_CREATE`
- **Fields**:
  - `notif_type`: Notification type (QMART)
  - `equipment`: Equipment Number
  - `description`: Short description

documents.title: pm_operations.md — `PM_CREATE_EQUIPMENT`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a new Equipment Master record.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_EQUI_CREATE`
- **Fields**:
  - `description`: Equipment name/desc
  - `category`: Equipment category (EQTYP)
  - `plant`: Plant

documents.title: pm_operations.md — `PM_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify PM configuration tables.
- **Tables checked**: AUFK, AFIH, QMEL, EQUI, IFLOT

documents.title: pm_operations.md — T-codes
documents.content: IW31, IW32, IW33, IW21, IW22, IW23, IP41, IP42, IP10, IP30, IE01, IE02, IE03, IL01, IL02, IL03

documents.title: pm_operations.md — Tables
documents.content: AUFK, AFIH, QMEL, EQUI, IFLOT, MPLA, MPOS

documents.title: pp_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # Production Planning (PP) Operations

documents.title: pp_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers Production Order creation, order confirmations, BOM explosions, routing retrievals, and configuration checks.

documents.title: pp_operations.md — `PP_CREATE_ORDER`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a Production Order.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_PRODORD_CREATE`
- **Fields**:
  - `material`: Material number
  - `plant`: Production plant
  - `quantity`: Target quantity
  - `order_type`: Order type (T003O)
  - `start_date`: Scheduled start date

documents.title: pp_operations.md — `PP_CONFIRM_ORDER`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Confirm Production Order operations.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_HDR`

documents.title: pp_operations.md — `PP_READ_BOM`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Explode a Bill of Materials.
- **Backend BAPI/FM**: `CS_BOM_EXPL_MAT_V2`
- **Fields**:
  - `material`: Material
  - `plant`: Plant
  - `bom_usage`: BOM usage (T011)

documents.title: pp_operations.md — `PP_READ_ROUTING`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Read task list / routing for a material.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_ROUTING_GET`

documents.title: pp_operations.md — `PP_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify PP configuration tables.
- **Tables checked**:
  - `T003O` (order types)
  - `T399D` (MRP plant parameters)
  - `T024F` (MRP controllers)

documents.title: qm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # Quality Management (QM) Operations

documents.title: qm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers Inspection Lot generation, quality results recording, PDF inspections certificates generation, and QM configs.

documents.title: qm_operations.md — `QM_CREATE_INSPECTION`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create an Inspection Lot.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_INSPLOT_CREATE`
- **Fields**:
  - `material`: Material number
  - `plant`: Plant
  - `insp_type`: Inspection type (TQ01)
  - `quantity`: Quantity

documents.title: qm_operations.md — `QM_RECORD_RESULTS`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Record characteristics inspection results.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_INSRES_RECORD`

documents.title: qm_operations.md — `QM_GENERATE_PDF`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Call RFC to generate inspection PDF certificate.
- **Backend FM**: `ZFM_QM_GENERATE_INSPECTION_PDF`
- **Fields**:
  - `insp_lot`: Inspection Lot Number

documents.title: qm_operations.md — `QM_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify QM configuration tables.
- **Tables checked**:
  - `TQ01` (inspection types)
  - `TQ02` (inspection origins)
  - `T156Q` (QM material movement assignments)

documents.title: sd_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # Sales & Distribution (SD) Operations

documents.title: sd_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers Sales Order management, Delivery notes creation, Billing documents, and functional configurations checks.

documents.title: sd_operations.md — `SD_CREATE_ORDER`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a Sales Order.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2`
- **Fields**:
  - `doc_type`: Sales doc type (TVAK)
  - `sales_org`: Sales Org
  - `distr_chan`: Distribution Channel
  - `division`: Division
  - `sold_to`: Sold-to Party
  - `ship_to`: Ship-to Party
  - `material`: Material number
  - `quantity`: Order quantity

documents.title: sd_operations.md — `SD_CHANGE_ORDER`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Modify an existing Sales Order.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE`

documents.title: sd_operations.md — `SD_CREATE_DELIVERY`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create Outbound Delivery from Sales Order.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_SLS`

documents.title: sd_operations.md — `SD_CREATE_INVOICE`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Post Billing Document (Invoice).
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_BILLINGDOC_CREATEMULTIPLE`

documents.title: sd_operations.md — `SD_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify SD configuration tables.
- **Tables checked**:
  - `TVAK` (sales document types)
  - `TVKO` (sales organizations)
  - `TVSB` (shipping conditions)
  - `TVFK` (billing types)
  - `KNVV` (customer sales data status)

documents.title: tm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # TM — Transportation Management Operations Map

documents.title: tm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers TM operations including Freight Orders, vehicle planning, carrier tendering, and charges calculation.

documents.title: tm_operations.md — `TM_FREIGHT_PLAN`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Interactive planning for transportation.
- **Backend BAPI**: /SCMTMS/PLN planning
- **Fields**:
  - `planning_profile`: TM Planning profile
  - `freight_unit`: Freight Unit ID

documents.title: tm_operations.md — `TM_CARRIER_SELECT`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Carrier selection and tendering.
- **Backend BAPI**: /SCMTMS/TSPStend
- **Fields**:
  - `freight_order`: Freight Order ID

documents.title: tm_operations.md — T-codes
documents.content: /SCMTMS/PLN, /SCMTMS/TOR, /SCMTMS/TEN

documents.title: tm_operations.md — Tables
documents.content: /SCMTMS/D_TORROT, /SCMTMS/D_TORITE, /SCMTMS/D_TCLROT

documents.title: tr_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # TR — Treasury Operations Map

documents.title: tr_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers Cash position, Liquidity planning, Payment run execution, Bank statement import, and configuration checks.

documents.title: tr_operations.md — `TR_PAYMENT_RUN`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Execute payment run.
- **Backend BAPI**: F110 batch program / `FI_PAYMENT_PROPOSAL_CREATE`
- **Fields**:
  - `run_date`: Payment run date
  - `run_id`: Payment run ID (identification)
  - `company_code`: Company code

documents.title: tr_operations.md — `TR_IMPORT_STATEMENT`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Import bank statements.
- **Backend BAPI**: `RFEBKA00` (FF_5) / `FEBA` post-process
- **Fields**:
  - `format`: Statement format (e.g. MT940)
  - `file_path`: Path to file

documents.title: tr_operations.md — `TR_CASH_POSITION`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Expose liquidity cash position.
- **Backend BAPI**: FF7A / FF7B read
- **Fields**:
  - `date`: Analysis date
  - `view`: Cash position or liquidity forecast

documents.title: tr_operations.md — `TR_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify house banks and payment parameters.
- **Tables checked**: T012, T012K, T042, T028G

documents.title: tr_operations.md — T-codes
documents.content: F110, FF_5, FF7A, FF7B, FI12, FBZP, FEBAN, DMEE, OT83

documents.title: tr_operations.md — Tables
documents.content: FEBKO, FEBEP, REGUH, REGUP, PAYR, T012, T012K, T042G

documents.title: wm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: # Warehouse Management (WM) Operations

documents.title: wm_operations.md — Overview
documents.content: Covers inventory movements, Transfer Orders (TO) creation, storage bins status, and warehouse configurations.

documents.title: wm_operations.md — `WM_GOODS_MOVEMENT`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Post a goods movement at MIGO level affecting warehouse storage.
- **Backend BAPI**: `BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE`

documents.title: wm_operations.md — `WM_CREATE_TO`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Create a Transfer Order.
- **Backend FM**: `L_TO_CREATE_MOVE_SU` (or standard L_TO_CREATE_SINGLE)
- **Fields**:
  - `lgnum`: Warehouse number (T300)
  - `tanum`: Transfer order number
  - `su_id`: Storage unit ID

documents.title: wm_operations.md — `WM_CHECK_CONFIG`
documents.content:
- **Purpose**: Verify WM configuration tables.
- **Tables checked**:
  - `T300` (warehouse numbers)
  - `T311` (WM movement types)
  - `T301` (storage types definitions)
